name: Zombie Wars TopDown Survival
description: Prepare to Vanquish Foes and Collect Treasure! Strategically Deploy Your Ammunition and Arsenal! Remember to Upgrade Your Firearms and Stock Up on Ammo Before Going Into Battle! instructions: Mouse click or tap to play and from PC you can use WASD amp ARROW to move
